name: docs-reconciliation
description: Multi-document reconciliation engine. Cross-references PRD (always present) against UX Design System and/or Mock documents to detect conflicts, coverage gaps, scope additions, naming drift, cascade violations, and specificity gaps. Supports bilateral (PRD+UX or PRD+Mock) and trilateral (PRD+UX+Mock) modes. Generates: (1) markdown reconciliation report with per-document maturity scores, (2) interactive HTML dashboard with coverage heatmap, filterable matrix, and per-document gauges, (3) editable Excalidraw diagrams (coverage heatmap, Venn overlap, traceability flow, gap treemap), and (4) optional delta tracking across runs.
